title: Inuarashi and Nekomamushi
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on inuarashi and nekomamushi within the Duke Inuarashi and Master Nekomamushi storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: A mammoth!? Why is such an ancient creature...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mysterious InVaders! Who are they!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're being invaded !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They've broken down the gate!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: They're Pirates! Drive 'em out of here!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The Wano Country Warrior, Raiza!? Never heard of him!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Do not lay waste to this country!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Please, just leave!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hahaha... so it does exist...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: The Fabled Country of the Minks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You lot sure like to run your mouths for a bunch'a animals.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: State your name!! Who are you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who the hell do you think you're talking to?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: known as one of the 3 beings labeled as "The Cala- Mities"!!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: The one you see standing before you... is the great yonko, his majesty Kaido's right- hand man!!!

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: His excellence, "Jack the drought" !!!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: star of the hundred beast pirates captain of the mammoth "JACK THE DROUGHT"

dialogue.speaker: Jack
dialogue.text: All land that he passes through Decays away as if it's been through a drought!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Now, hand over "RA120"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You wouldn't want your happy-go- lucky, peaceful lifestyle...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: To be threatened, now would you?!

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: hundred beast pirates gifters headliner SHEEPSHEAD

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Or what... you really wanna piece o' me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gee hehehe he!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Of course not!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Gramps Mon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yet we must have you hear us out...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: or else we won't get any- where...

dialogue.speaker: Minks
dialogue.text: Jack, did you say...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: We would and will never lie...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: If you're looking for somebody, you must patiently search around case by CA...

summary: Inuarashi and Nekomamushi: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
